title: Social Advocate Badge for Social Sharing
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to earn a 'Social Advocate' badge when I share content using the social sharing feature, so that I am recognized for promoting the platform.
description:
Award a 'Social Advocate' badge when a user uses the social sharing feature. The badge artwork has been provided.

A technical limitation exists: the `share.js` library only opens the sharing dialog (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn) but does not confirm whether the user actually completed the share. A proposed workaround is to use a setTimeout after the share button click to award the badge after a delay.

This ticket has been moved to backlog for future implementation as part of broader social media integration plans.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Social Advocate' badge is awarded when a user initiates a social share
The badge appears in the user's badge collection in Settings & Badges
Badge artwork matches the provided design
ux_changes: Social Advocate badge displayed in the user's badge collection after sharing content via social sharing buttons.
middleware_changes: Badge trigger logic to detect social share button click and award the badge. Workaround needed since share.js cannot confirm actual share completion.
data_model_changes: New badge record for 'Social Advocate' with associated artwork and metadata.
implementation_notes: The share.js library does not provide confirmation of completed shares. A setTimeout-based approach was proposed but the ticket was moved to backlog for broader social media integration planning.
comment_summary: Developer noted that share.js cannot verify if a user actually completed a share, only that the dialog was opened. Proposed a setTimeout workaround. Reporter moved the ticket to backlog for future social media integration work.
